infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Daddy Caddy uses the camera to capture photos and videos of your golf rounds.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Daddy Caddy needs access to your contacts to select recipients for golf score updates and messages.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Daddy Caddy uses the microphone for voice shot tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Daddy Caddy needs access to your photo library to select and save golf media.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Daddy Caddy uses speech recognition to convert voice commands to golf scores.
